hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美国银行首席执行官布赖恩·莫伊尼汉表示消费银行业务“健康”，高于预期；【FINANCE】尽管伊朗战争，中国机器人出租车公司仍继续在阿联酋扩张；【FINANCE】Bernstein 估计，到 2030 年，预测市场将增长到 1 万亿美元。

items.title: Bank of America tops estimates as CEO Brian Moynihan says consumer banking is 'healthy'
items.summary: Bank of America, the second-largest U.S. bank by assets, has topped expectations for earnings per share for 23 consecutive quarters.
items.title_zh: 美国银行首席执行官布赖恩·莫伊尼汉表示消费银行业务“健康”，高于预期
items.summary_zh: 美国银行是美国资产第二大银行，其每股收益连续 23 个季度超出预期。

items.title: Chinese robotaxi companies forge ahead with UAE expansion despite Iran war
items.summary: Ride-hailing company Didi plans to begin its first overseas robotaxi test in the United Arab Emirates later this year.
items.title_zh: 尽管伊朗战争，中国机器人出租车公司仍继续在阿联酋扩张
items.summary_zh: 网约车公司滴滴计划今年晚些时候在阿拉伯联合酋长国开始其首次海外机器人出租车测试。

items.title: Prediction markets will grow to $1 trillion by 2030, Bernstein estimates
items.summary: The investment bank said volumes will reach an estimated $240 billion in 2026 and grow at a 80% compound annual rate between 2025 and 2030.
items.title_zh: Bernstein 估计，到 2030 年，预测市场将增长到 1 万亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该投资银行表示，预计 2026 年交易量将达到 2400 亿美元，并在 2025 年至 2030 年间以 80% 的复合年增长率增长。

items.title: Pope Leo, Amid Standoff With Trump, Says ‘Woe to Those Who Manipulate Religion’
items.summary: For days, Pope Leo XIV has attracted criticism from President Trump and his allies for refusing to back the war in Iran. On Thursday, he reiterated his calls for peace.
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥在与特朗普的对峙中表示“操纵宗教的人有祸了”
items.summary_zh: 连日来，教皇利奥十四世因拒绝支持伊朗战争而受到特朗普总统及其盟友的批评。周四，他再次呼吁和平。

items.title: Clarity Act’s stablecoin yield language pushed back; ban on idle balances still intact
items.summary: A source told The Block that the latest text reflects previous language that bans rewards on idle stablecoin holdings.
items.title_zh: 《澄清法案》的稳定币收益率语言被推迟；闲置余额禁令仍然有效
items.summary_zh: 一位消息人士告诉 The Block，最新的文本反映了之前禁止对闲置稳定币持有进行奖励的措辞。

items.title: Morgan Stanley’s Amy Oldenburg says crypto ‘becoming daily business’ across the firm
items.summary: Morgan Stanley's digital asset chief said demand is split between direct crypto exposure and ETFs, forcing banks to build for both.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利的艾米·奥尔登堡表示，加密货币正在成为整个公司的“日常业务”
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利数字资产主管表示，需求分为直接加密货币敞口和 ETF，迫使银行同时为这两种资产进行建设。

items.title: Introducing GPT-Rosalind for life sciences research
items.summary: OpenAI introduces GPT-Rosalind, a frontier reasoning model built to accelerate drug discovery, genomics analysis, protein reasoning, and scientific research workflows.
items.title_zh: 引入 GPT-Rosalind 用于生命科学研究
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了 GPT-Rosalind，这是一种前沿推理模型，旨在加速药物发现、基因组分析、蛋白质推理和科学研究工作流程。

items.title: Live Updates: Lebanon-Israel Cease-Fire Goes Into Effect
items.summary: It was unclear if the agreement between Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and the Lebanese government was being honored. Hezbollah, the Iranian-backed militia, acknowledged the temporary truce but did not say if it would abide by it.
items.title_zh: 实时更新：黎巴嫩-以色列停火生效
items.summary_zh: 目前尚不清楚总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡和黎巴嫩政府之间的协议是否得到遵守。伊朗支持的民兵真主党承认临时休战，但没有表示是否会遵守。

items.title: Codex for (almost) everything
items.summary: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.
items.title_zh: （几乎）所有内容的法典
items.summary_zh: 适用于 macOS 和 Windows 的更新后的 Codex 应用程序增加了计算机使用、应用程序内浏览、图像生成、内存和插件，以加速开发人员工作流程。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: Retail traders pile into Allbirds after odd AI pivot. History shows it won't end well
items.summary: This surge of speculative buying reflects a broader return of animal spirits among small traders.
items.title_zh: 在奇怪的人工智能转向之后，零售交易员纷纷涌入 Allbirds。历史表明它不会有好结局
items.summary_zh: 投机性买盘的激增反映出小贸易商的动物精神更广泛地回归。

items.title: Jamie Dimon says Anthropic's Mythos reveals 'a lot more vulnerabilities' for cyberattacks
items.summary: The remarks show how a technology welcomed by corporations as a productivity boon can also pose serious threats, like uncovering new ways to hack into systems.
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 表示，Anthropic 的神话揭示了网络攻击的“更多漏洞”
items.summary_zh: 这些言论表明，一项因提高生产力而受到企业欢迎的技术也可能带来严重威胁，例如发现侵入系统的新方法。

items.title: Pope criticises 'tyrants' who spend billions on wars after Trump spat
items.summary: The comments follow a high-profile spat with US President Donald Trump, who called the Pope weak on crime.
items.title_zh: 特朗普口角后，教皇批评在战争上花费数十亿美元的“暴君”
items.summary_zh: 这些言论是在与美国总统唐纳德·特朗普发生高调争执之后发表的，特朗普称教皇在犯罪问题上软弱无力。

items.title: Turkish police detain 162 people over online posts about school shootings
items.summary: At least 16 people were injured in a shooting at a high school on Tuesday, before another nine were killed in a separate school shooting on Wednesday.
items.title_zh: 土耳其警方因在网上发布有关校园枪击事件的帖子而拘留了 162 人
items.summary_zh: 周二，一所高中发生枪击事件，造成至少 16 人受伤，周三又发生一起校园枪击事件，另有 9 人死亡。

items.title: Naples bank robbers hold 25 people hostage then vanish through tunnel
items.summary: The armed men reportedly evaded capture by escaping through the city's sewer system.
items.title_zh: 那不勒斯银行劫匪劫持25人作为人质，然后通过隧道消失
items.summary_zh: 据报道，这些武装人员通过城市的下水道系统逃脱了追捕。

items.title: Why China Isn’t Pushing Iran to Accept U.S. Demands to End War
items.summary: Despite the economic risks from the war, Beijing will likely stick to a hands-off approach. It is wary of being entangled in a conflict it opposed and has little sway over.
items.title_zh: 为什么中国不敦促伊朗接受美国结束战争的要求
items.summary_zh: 尽管战争带来经济风险，北京可能仍会坚持不干涉的做法。它对卷入它所反对的冲突持谨慎态度，并且几乎没有影响力。

items.title: Orban’s Defeat Punctures Europe’s Far Right, but Also Offers It a Road Map
items.summary: Corruption and economic mismanagement brought down Hungary’s authoritarian leader. Will his political disciples avoid those pitfalls?
items.title_zh: 欧尔班的失败刺痛了欧洲极右翼，但也为其提供了路线图
items.summary_zh: 腐败和经济管理不善导致了匈牙利独裁领导人的垮台。他的政治门徒会避免这些陷阱吗？

items.title: Bahrain Charges Intelligence Officer in the Death of a Detainee
items.summary: The officer was charged with assault leading to death, in the case of a man who was accused by Bahraini authorities of espionage during a domestic crackdown tied to the war in Iran.
items.title_zh: 巴林指控情报官员导致一名被拘留者死亡
items.summary_zh: 这名军官被指控袭击导致死亡，巴林当局指控一名男子在与伊朗战争有关的国内镇压行动中从事间谍活动。

items.title: The 24-hour trap: Why the UK’s new crypto rules could catch some firms off guard
items.summary: The new regulations revealed by the Financial Conduct Authority include several technical traps which crypto software providers need to watch for to avoid sanctions
items.title_zh: 24 小时陷阱：为什么英国的新加密货币规则可能会让一些公司措手不及
items.summary_zh: 金融行为监管局公布的新规定包括加密软件提供商需要警惕的几个技术陷阱，以避免制裁

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Ethereum (ETH) price drops 1.3% as index trades lower
items.summary: Aave (AAVE), down 1.1% from Wednesday, was also an underperformer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：以太坊 (ETH) 价格因指数走低而下跌 1.3%
items.summary_zh: Aave (AAVE) 较周三下跌 1.1%，表现也不佳。

items.title: Russia-linked Grinex exchange suspends operations after $15 million hack, blames ‘hostile states’
items.summary: Liquidity and users of the sanctioned Garantex exchange have flowed into Grinex over the past year, Elliptic claims.
items.title_zh: 与俄罗斯有关的 Grinex 交易所在遭受 1500 万美元黑客攻击后暂停运营，指责“敌对国家”
items.summary_zh: Elliptic 声称，过去一年，受制裁的 Garantex 交易所的流动性和用户已流入 Grinex。

items.title: The next evolution of the Agents SDK
items.summary: OpenAI updates the Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and a model-native harness, helping developers build secure, long-running agents across files and tools.
items.title_zh: Agents SDK 的下一步发展
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过本机沙箱执行和模型本机工具更新了 Agents SDK，帮助开发人员跨文件和工具构建安全、长期运行的代理。

items.title: New ways to create personalized images in the Gemini app
items.summary: Nano Banana 2 now uses your personal context and Google Photos to create images that reflect your unique life.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini 应用程序中创建个性化图像的新方法
items.summary_zh: Nano Banana 2 现在使用您的个人背景和 Google Photos 来创建反映您独特生活的图像。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.title: Preview tool helps makers visualize 3D-printed objects
items.summary: By quickly generating aesthetically accurate previews of fabricated objects, the VisiPrint system could make prototyping faster and less wasteful.
items.title_zh: 预览工具可帮助创客可视化 3D 打印物体
items.summary_zh: 通过快速生成美观准确的预制件预览，VisiPrint 系统可以加快原型制作速度并减少浪费。

items.title: MIT researchers use AI to uncover atomic defects in materials
items.summary: A new model measures defects that can be leveraged to improve materials’ mechanical strength, heat transfer, and energy-conversion efficiency.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员利用人工智能发现材料中的原子缺陷
items.summary_zh: 一种新模型可以测量可用来提高材料机械强度、传热和能量转换效率的缺陷。

items.title: Russia launches deadliest aerial attack in months, killing 18 in Ukraine
items.summary: A Ukrainian drone attack killed two people in Russia, Moscow says, after an Orthodox Easter truce.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯发动数月来最致命空袭 乌克兰18人死亡
items.summary_zh: 莫斯科称，东正教复活节休战后，乌克兰无人机袭击造成俄罗斯两人死亡。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 03/31/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Tuesday, 03/31/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Selling Volatility: The Most Seductive Backtest in Finance [Quantt] Here is a strategy with a thirty-year track record. Se
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日星期二 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！卖出波动性：金融领域最诱人的回测 [Quantt] 这是一个拥有三十年记录的策略。硒

items.title: Cardano's Charles Hoskinson says Bitcoin's quantum fix is a hard fork that can't save Satoshi's coins
items.summary: The Cardano founder argues BIP-361 is mislabeled as a soft fork and that its zero-knowledge recovery plan cannot rescue roughly 1.7 million pre-2013 bitcoin, including Satoshi's holdings.
items.title_zh: 卡尔达诺的查尔斯霍斯金森表示，比特币的量子解决方案是硬分叉，无法拯救中本聪的硬币
items.summary_zh: 这位 Cardano 创始人认为 BIP-361 被错误地标记为软分叉，其零知识恢复计划无法挽救 2013 年之前的约 170 万枚比特币，其中包括中本聪持有的比特币。

items.title: Bitcoin slides back below $74,000 as breakout to higher levels fails again
items.summary: The $75,000-$76,000 range has proven to be stiff resistance as bitcoin attempts to claw back this year's losses.
items.title_zh: 比特币跌回 74,000 美元下方，突破更高水平再次失败
items.summary_zh: 事实证明，随着比特币试图挽回今年的损失，75,000 美元至 76,000 美元的区间是一个强劲的阻力位。

items.title: VerifiedX brings privacy layer to Bitcoin as institutional demand for confidentiality grows
items.summary: A new zero-knowledge-powered system enables shielded bitcoin transactions, reflecting a broader push across crypto to address the “privacy gap” keeping institutions off public blockchains.
items.title_zh: 随着机构对保密性的需求不断增长，VerifiedX 为比特币带来了隐私层
items.summary_zh: 一种新的零知识驱动系统可以实现受保护的比特币交易，这反映出加密货币领域正在更广泛地推动解决使机构远离公共区块链的“隐私差距”。

items.title: Drift gets $148 million funding from Tether and partners as it replaces Circle stablecoin with USDT after massive exploit
items.summary: The money will be used by Drift to recover user funds after more than $270 million in clients assets were exploited this month, and will relaunch the protocol as a USDT-based perpetuals DEX on Solana.
items.title_zh: Drift 获得 Tether 及其合作伙伴 1.48 亿美元的融资，在遭受大规模攻击后用 USDT 取代了 Circle 稳定币
items.summary_zh: 在本月超过 2.7 亿美元的客户资产被利用后，Drift 将使用这笔资金追回用户资金，并将在 Solana 上重新启动该协议，作为基于 USDT 的永续 DEX。

items.title: Keep an eye on XRP, Plasma, DOGE as bitcoin drifts

items.title_zh: 随着比特币的变化，密切关注 XRP、Plasma、DOGE
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 4 月 16 日您需要了解的信息

items.title: Elon Musk’s X Money stands to disrupt payments and pressure PayPal, but crypto plans may hit regulatory hurdles: Mizuho
items.summary: X launched a new feature this week where users can view financial data on stocks and cryptocurrencies directly.
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 X Money 可能会扰乱支付并向 PayPal 施加压力，但加密货币计划可能会遇到监管障碍：瑞穗 (Mizuho)
items.summary_zh: X 本周推出了一项新功能，用户可以直接查看股票和加密货币的财务数据。

items.title: AI fundamentals
items.summary: Learn what AI is, how it works, and how tools like ChatGPT use large language models. A clear, beginner-friendly guide to understanding artificial intelligence.

items.summary_zh: 了解人工智能是什么、它是如何工作的以及 ChatGPT 等工具如何使用大型语言模型。清晰、适合初学者的人工智能理解指南。

items.title_zh: 带有句子变压器的多模态嵌入和重新排序模型

items.title: Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model
items.summary: Veo 3.1 Lite is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最具成本效益的视频生成模型 Veo 3.1 Lite 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Veo 3.1 Lite 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.
items.title_zh: 工作哲学
items.summary_zh: 作为北卡罗来纳州技术伦理学博士后研究员，Michal Masny 正在推进新计算技术的社会和伦理层面的对话、教学和研究。

items.title: Evaluating the ethics of autonomous systems
items.summary: MIT researchers developed a testing framework that pinpoints situations where AI decision-support systems are not treating people and communities fairly.
items.title_zh: 评估自治系统的伦理
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了一个测试框架，可以查明人工智能决策支持系统不公平对待人和社区的情况。

items.title: Goldman Sachs bond traders stumbled as Wall Street rivals thrived: 'A fire is being lit under' them
items.summary: Goldman's identity as a trader's firm — one expected to perform in turbulent markets — makes any stumble in the division notable.
items.title_zh: 高盛债券交易员跌跌撞撞，而华尔街竞争对手却蓬勃发展：“他们的底下正在点燃一把火”
items.summary_zh: 高盛作为交易商公司的身份——预计将在动荡的市场中表现出色——使得该部门的任何失误都引人注目。

items.title: Regulators are reportedly zeroing in on suspicious trades ahead of market-moving Trump post
items.summary: The information sought includes so-called Tag 50 identifiers, which can be used to determine who was behind the trades.
items.title_zh: 据报道，在特朗普发表影响市场的言论之前，监管机构正在重点关注可疑交易
items.summary_zh: 寻求的信息包括所谓的 Tag 50 标识符，可用于确定交易背后的人员。

items.title: Morgan Stanley tops estimates as trading revenue exceeds expectations by nearly $1 billion
items.summary: Morgan Stanley's results in the quarter were powered by the firm's fixed income and equities trading operations, which produced about $8.5 billion in revenue.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利交易收入超预期近 10 亿美元，超出预期
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利本季度的业绩得益于该公司的固定收益和股票交易业务，产生了约 85 亿美元的收入。

items.title: David Einhorn signals caution as his hedge fund Greenlight prioritizes capital protection
items.summary: "It probably won't surprise anyone that we are again putting capital preservation at the top of our priorities," Einhorn said in his latest investor letter.
items.title_zh: 大卫·艾因霍恩 (David Einhorn) 表示谨慎，他的对冲基金 Greenlight 优先考虑资本保护
items.summary_zh: 艾因霍恩在最新的投资者信中表示：“我们再次将资本保值作为我们的首要任务，这可能不会令任何人感到惊讶。”

items.title: Global recession is inevitable if Strait of Hormuz stays shut, says Citadel's Ken Griffin
items.summary: A prolonged blockage of the Strait of Hormuz for the next six to 12 months will mean an unavoidable recession, the billionaire investor said.
items.title_zh: Citadel 的 Ken Griffin 表示，如果霍尔木兹海峡继续关闭，全球经济衰退将不可避免
items.summary_zh: 这位亿万富翁投资者表示，未来 6 到 12 个月霍尔木兹海峡的长期封锁将意味着不可避免的经济衰退。

items.title: Singer D4vd arrested in connection with death of missing teen girl
items.summary: The remains of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez were found in the singer's car last year.
items.title_zh: 歌手 D4vd 因涉嫌失踪少女死亡而被捕
items.summary_zh: 去年，14 岁的塞莱斯特·里瓦斯·埃尔南德斯 (Celeste Rivas Hernandez) 的遗体在这位歌手的车里被发现。

items.title: Brazil's former spy chief released from ICE detention
items.summary: Bolsonaro ally Alexandre Ramagem was stopped by immigration agents in Orlando, Florida on Monday.
items.title_zh: 巴西前间谍头子从 ICE 拘留中获释
items.summary_zh: 博尔索纳罗的盟友亚历山大·拉马吉姆周一在佛罗里达州奥兰多被移民官员拦下。

items.title: Ex-Virginia deputy governor kills wife and himself in murder-suicide, police say
items.summary: Investigators say Justin Fairfax shot his wife, Cerina, multiple times before turning the gun on himself.
items.title_zh: 警方称前弗吉尼亚州副州长在谋杀自杀中杀死了妻子和他自己
items.summary_zh: 调查人员称，贾斯汀·费尔法克斯多次向妻子塞丽娜开枪，然后开枪自杀。

items.title: South Korea's runaway wolf finally captured after nine-day search
items.summary: The search has been marked by twists and turns, gripping South Korea and even inspiring a meme coin.
items.title_zh: 韩国逃跑的狼经过9天的搜寻终于被抓获
items.summary_zh: 这次搜寻过程一波三折，牵动着韩国的心，甚至还引发了一种迷因币的诞生。

items.title: Lawmakers clash with RFK Jr as he shifts focus away from vaccines
items.summary: During a three-hour hearing, the US health secretary tried to focus on chronic disease while being pressed on vaccines.
items.title_zh: 由于小罗伯特·肯尼迪将焦点从疫苗上转移，议员们与他发生冲突
items.summary_zh: 在长达三个小时的听证会上，美国卫生部长在迫于疫苗压力的同时，试图将重点放在慢性病上。

items.title: Rescuers to use air cushions in latest effort to save stranded whale
items.summary: "Timmy" has been stranded in the Baltic Sea for weeks despite several attempts to free the ailing animal.
items.title_zh: 救援人员使用气垫来拯救搁浅的鲸鱼
items.summary_zh: 尽管多次尝试营救这只生病的动物，“蒂米”仍被困在波罗的海数周。

items.title: Got $100 Million? Ukraine Has Just the Fertilizer Plant for You.
items.summary: An effort to privatize the facility is a key test of whether Kyiv can overcome concerns about Russian attacks and corruption to attract foreign investment.
items.title_zh: 有1亿美元吗？乌克兰有适合您的化肥厂。
items.summary_zh: 将该设施私有化的努力是基辅能否克服对俄罗斯袭击和腐败的担忧以吸引外国投资的关键考验。

items.title: The Costa Rican Mountain Town Offering Sanctuary to Families Deported by Trump
items.summary: In a cloud forest village, a network of residents, foreigners and pacifist Quakers offered a precarious yet vital sanctuary for families expelled by the U.S. government.
items.title_zh: 哥斯达黎加山城为被特朗普驱逐的家庭提供庇护
items.summary_zh: 在一个云林村庄里，由居民、外国人和和平主义贵格会教徒组成的网络为被美国政府驱逐的家庭提供了一个不稳定但至关重要的庇护所。

items.title: Russian Strikes Kill at Least 15 in Ukraine in Biggest Attack in Months
items.summary: Moscow is again ramping up missile and drone attacks on civilian targets, dispelling any notion that a temporary cease-fire for Orthodox Easter might become more lasting.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯空袭乌克兰至少15人死亡，这是数月来最大规模的袭击
items.summary_zh: 莫斯科再次加大对平民目标的导弹和无人机攻击力度，打消了东正教复活节临时停火可能变得更持久的想法。

items.title: Pakistan Looks to Play Peacemaker Between U.S. and Iran, Again
items.summary: After talks in Islamabad last weekend led to a two-week cease-fire, Pakistan is offering to host another round in an attempt to sustain continuing peace efforts.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦希望再次在美国和伊朗之间扮演和平缔造者的角色
items.summary_zh: 上周末在伊斯兰堡举行的会谈导致两周停火后，巴基斯坦提出主办另一轮停火，以维持持续的和平努力。

items.title: South African Politician Julius Malema Is Sentenced to 5 Years in Prison
items.summary: The leftist lawmaker has been a prime target of President Trump’s attacks on South Africa. The ruling, handed down after a conviction on gun charges, leaves Mr. Malema’s political future in doubt.
items.title_zh: 南非政治家朱利叶斯·马勒马被判处 5 年监禁
items.summary_zh: 这位左翼议员一直是特朗普总统攻击南非的主要目标。这项裁决是在因枪支指控被定罪后作出的，这让马勒马的政治前途充满了疑问。

items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Sunday, 03/29/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Brave New Backtest [Robot Wealth] My last two articles on AI and trading research got more engagement than almost anything

items.title: U.S. CFTC's Selig says AI has helped make up for staffing cuts at key crypto watchdog
items.summary: Chairman Mike Selig faces explosive new market duties with crypto and prediction markets, where he said "numerous investigations" have begun.
items.title_zh: 美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 的塞利格 (Selig) 表示，人工智能有助于弥补主要加密货币监管机构的人员削减
items.summary_zh: 董事长迈克·塞利格（Mike Selig）面临着加密货币和预测市场的爆炸性新市场职责，他表示“大量调查”已经开始。

items.title: Crypto for Advisors: Tokenization’s evolution
items.summary: Tokenized assets are moving from concept to portfolio allocation. Learn how compliance architecture and institutional movement are redefining risk and opportunity for advisors.
items.title_zh: 顾问的加密货币：代币化的演变
items.summary_zh: 代币化资产正在从概念转向投资组合配置。了解合规架构和机构运动如何重新定义顾问的风险和机会。

items.title: Wall Street trading-tech is coming to crypto as DoubleZero rolls out high-speed data for Solana
items.summary: The project, called DoubleZero Edge, offers a real-time feed of raw data from the Solana blockchain, giving traders faster access to information that can influence prices.
items.title_zh: 随着 DoubleZero 为 Solana 推出高速数据，华尔街交易技术即将进入加密领域
items.summary_zh: 该项目名为 DoubleZero Edge，提供来自 Solana 区块链的实时原始数据，使交易者能够更快地获取可能影响价格的信息。

items.title: Circle hit with class action lawsuit over alleged inaction in $280 million Drift exploit
items.summary: The lawsuit, filed by law firm Gibbs Mura, alleged that Circle failed to act swiftly to freeze the stolen USDC tied to the attack.
items.title_zh: Circle 因涉嫌在价值 2.8 亿美元的 Drift 漏洞中不作为而遭受集体诉讼
items.summary_zh: 该诉讼由 Gibbs Mura 律师事务所提起，指控 Circle 未能迅速采取行动冻结与此次攻击相关的被盗 USDC。

items.title: Bored Apes-creator Yuga Labs taps new CEO as Greg Solano moves to chairman role
items.summary: Yuga Labs' new CEO Michael Figge most recently served as chief product officer and has been with the company since 2021.
items.title_zh: 《无聊的猿》创作者 Yuga Labs 任命新首席执行官，格雷格·索拉诺 (Greg Solano) 出任董事长
items.summary_zh: Yuga Labs 的新任首席执行官 Michael Figge 最近担任首席产品官，自 2021 年以来一直在该公司任职。

items.title: Texas man gets 23 years for $20 million crypto scam supposedly backed by Picasso and Van Gogh artwork
items.summary: A Texas man was sentenced to over two decades in prison after prosecutors said he scammed investors of more than $20 million.
items.title_zh: 德克萨斯州男子因涉嫌毕加索和梵高艺术品支持的 2000 万美元加密货币诈骗被判 23 年徒刑
items.summary_zh: 一名得克萨斯州男子在检察官称他诈骗投资者超过 2000 万美元后被判处 20 多年监禁。

items.title: Tempo unveils pragmatic privacy solution called Zones, a way to run permissioned parallel blockchains
items.summary: Each Zone will offer a private execution environment managed by a trusted entity, Tempo wrote in an announcement.
items.title_zh: Tempo 推出名为 Zones 的实用隐私解决方案，这是一种运行许可并行区块链的方法
items.summary_zh: Tempo 在一份公告中写道，每个区域都将提供由受信任实体管理的私有执行环境。

items.title: Inside Binance’s plan to become a global financial super app
items.summary: Richard Teng explains why crypto fundamentals remain strong, how regulation is driving global adoption, and where Binance is headed next.
items.title_zh: 币安计划成为全球金融超级应用程序
items.summary_zh: Richard Teng 解释了加密货币基本面为何依然强劲、监管如何推动全球采用以及币安下一步的发展方向。

items.title: ‘This is nuts’: CFTC chair Selig grilled by lawmakers on prediction markets, Hyperliquid, and staffing
items.summary: Selig faced heat from lawmakers on how he plans to oversee prediction markets and whether it has the headcount to do it.
items.title_zh: “这太疯狂了”：美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 主席塞利格 (Selig) 受到立法者关于预测市场、超流动性和人员配置的拷问
items.summary_zh: 塞利格因计划如何监管预测市场以及是否有足够的人力而受到立法者的热议。

items.title: Accelerating the cyber defense ecosystem that protects us all
items.summary: Leading security firms and enterprises join OpenAI’s Trusted Access for Cyber, using GPT-5.4-Cyber and $10M in API grants to strengthen global cyber defense.
items.title_zh: 加速保护我们所有人的网络防御生态系统
items.summary_zh: 领先的安全公司和企业加入 OpenAI 的网络可信访问，利用 GPT-5.4-Cyber​​ 和 1000 万美元的 API 拨款来加强全球网络防御。

items.title: Trusted access for the next era of cyber defense
items.summary: OpenAI expands its Trusted Access for Cyber program, introducing GPT-5.4-Cyber to vetted defenders and strengthening safeguards as AI cybersecurity capabilities advance.
items.title_zh: 下一个网络防御时代的可信访问
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 扩展了其可信网络访问计划，向经过审查的防御者引入 GPT-5.4-Cyber​​，并随着 AI 网络安全能力的进步而加强保障措施。

items.title: Enterprises power agentic workflows in Cloudflare Agent Cloud with OpenAI
items.summary: Cloudflare brings OpenAI’s GPT-5.4 and Codex to Agent Cloud, enabling enterprises to build, deploy, and scale AI agents for real-world tasks with speed and security.
items.title_zh: 企业通过 OpenAI 为 Cloudflare Agent Cloud 中的代理工作流程提供支持
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 将 OpenAI 的 GPT-5.4 和 Codex 引入 Agent Cloud，使企业能够快速、安全地构建、部署和扩展用于实际任务的 AI 代理。

items.title: Applications of AI at OpenAI
items.summary: Explore how OpenAI products like ChatGPT, Codex, and APIs bring AI into real-world use for work, development, and everyday tasks.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 的人工智能应用
items.summary_zh: 探索 ChatGPT、Codex 和 API 等 OpenAI 产品如何将 AI 应用于现实世界的工作、开发和日常任务。

items.title: ChatGPT for operations teams
items.summary: Learn how operations teams use ChatGPT to streamline workflows, improve coordination, standardize processes, and drive faster execution.
items.title_zh: 适用于运营团队的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 了解运营团队如何使用 ChatGPT 简化工作流程、改善协调、标准化流程并加快执行速度。

items.title: Financial services
items.summary: Explore AI resources for financial services, including prompt packs, GPTs, guides, and tools to help institutions deploy and scale AI securely.
items.title_zh: 金融服务
items.summary_zh: 探索金融服务的人工智能资源，包括提示包、GPT、指南和工具，以帮助机构安全地部署和扩展人工智能。

items.title: The PR you would have opened yourself
items.title_zh: 你自己开的 PR

items.title: Inside VAKRA: Reasoning, Tool Use, and Failure Modes of Agents
items.title_zh: VAKRA 内部：代理的推理、工具使用和故障模式

items.title: Meet HoloTab by HCompany. Your AI browser companion.
items.title_zh: 了解 HCompany 的 HoloTab。您的人工智能浏览器伴侣。

items.title: Waypoint-1.5: Higher-Fidelity Interactive Worlds for Everyday GPUs
items.title_zh: Waypoint-1.5：适用于日常 GPU 的更高保真度交互世界

items.title: Safetensors is Joining the PyTorch Foundation
items.title_zh: Safetensors 即将加入 PyTorch 基金会

items.title: Welcome Gemma 4: Frontier multimodal intelligence on device
items.title_zh: 欢迎 Gemma 4：设备上的前沿多模式智能

items.title: Falcon Perception
items.title_zh: 猎鹰感知

items.title: Any Custom Frontend with Gradio's Backend
items.title_zh: 任何带有 Gradio 后端的自定义前端

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS：下一代富有表现力的人工智能语音
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
items.summary: Skills in Chrome let you discover, save and remix AI workflows — and repeat them instantly.
items.title_zh: 将您最好的 AI 提示变成 Chrome 中的一键式工具
items.summary_zh: Chrome 中的技能可让您发现、保存和重新混合 AI 工作流程 - 并立即重复它们。

items.title: Bringing people together at AI for the Economy Forum
items.summary: Google is bringing people together in Washington D.C. at our AI for the Economy Forum.
items.title_zh: 人工智能经济论坛将人们聚集在一起
items.summary_zh: 谷歌将人们聚集在华盛顿特区，参加我们的人工智能经济论坛。

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.
items.title_zh: Gemini API 中平衡成本和可靠性的新方法
items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 Gemini API 引入两个新的推理层：Flex 和 Priority，以平衡成本和延迟。

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Vids 中免费创建、编辑和分享视频
items.summary_zh: 由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 提供支持的 Google Vids 即将推出新的 AI 功能，例如免费生成高质量视频等。

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.title_zh: 我们正在创建新的卫星图像地图，以帮助保护巴西的森林。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌与巴西政府合作开发卫星图像地图，以帮助保护该国的森林。

items.title: Q&A: MIT SHASS and the future of education in the age of AI
items.summary: As the School of Humanities, Arts, and Social Sciences marks 75 years, Dean Agustín Rayo reflects on how AI is reshaping higher education and why SHASS disciplines continue to be central to MIT’s mission.
items.title_zh: 问答：MIT SHASS 和人工智能时代教育的未来
items.summary_zh: 在人文、艺术和社会科学学院成立 75 周年之际，院长 Agustín Rayo 反思了人工智能如何重塑高等教育，以及为什么 SHASS 学科仍然是麻省理工学院使命的核心。

items.title: Sixteen new START.nano companies are developing hard-tech solutions with the support of MIT.nano
items.summary: Startup accelerator program grows to over 30 companies, almost half of them with MIT pedigrees.
items.title_zh: 十六家新的 START.nano 公司正在 MIT.nano 的支持下开发硬技术解决方案
items.summary_zh: 创业加速器计划已发展到超过 30 家公司，其中几乎一半拥有 MIT 出身。

items.title: Working to advance the nuclear renaissance
items.summary: Dean Price, assistant professor in the Department of Nuclear Science and Engineering, sees a bright future for nuclear power, and believes AI can help us realize that vision.
items.title_zh: 致力于推进核复兴
items.summary_zh: 核科学与工程系助理教授 Dean Price 看到了核电的光明前景，并相信人工智能可以帮助我们实现这一愿景。
